Cyce 26 atack: W-F1-AA-RES-T2J3-QZERO-RANK-CONSISTENCY

  Ledger respected: B=F_p (q_gen=p), F=F_{p^2} (q_line=p^2), q_chal unused,
  D=F_p(n=p),t=sigma=2,j=3,eta_reserve=2/nsub-reserve,offR0
  (kappa=uвҲ§bвү 0). Restricted line-incidence/residue calculation only; no
q_gen/protocol/lit/CA/MCA/line-decoding/urve-MCA/SNARKclaim.

  I worked the realized-slope condition c_0(z) вҲҲ span_B(c_1(z),c_2(z),c_3(z))
  directly,intheF-planemodel.TheresultcorrectsagapinhowCycle25's
  audit framed the rank-drop strata, and isolates a single explicit scalar
obstrucion.

SetupIuse

  Off R0, {u,b} (u=[W]_E, b=[Bnum]_E) is an F-basis of A=F[X]/E, so the F-linear
  isoAвү…F^2,c=su+tbвҶҰ(s,t),carrieseachcolumntoavector
  v_i(z)=(s_i(z),t_i(z))вҲҲF^2, and F^2вү…B^4 via {1,Оұ}. From Cycle 25/20:

v_1=(p1^1-zq1^1,p2^1-zq2^1),v_2=(p1^2-zq1^2,p2^2-zq2^2),

v_3=(-1,z),v_0=(p1^0-zq1^0,p2^0-zq2^0),

q1=c_bВ·О·,О·=(c^2-d)+cП„_1+П„_2вҹ№q1^1=c_bc,q1^2=c_b,q1^0=c_b(c^2-d).

  Realizable slope z вҹә v_0(z) вҲҲ span_B(v_1(z),v_2(z),v_3(z)) вҠҶ F^2вү…B^4. Write
  вҹЁx,yвҹ©:=Im_Оұ(xМ„y)forthealternatingB-areaform(soвҹЁx,yвҹ©=0вҹәx,yare
  B-proportional). Let C(z)=[v_1|v_2|v_3]вҲҲMat_{4Г—3}(B).

  The rank stratification, done correctly

  Define the two strata by the 3Г—3 minors of C(z) as polynomials in (z_0,z_1):

DEP:=all3x3minorsofC(z)vanishidentically(rank_BC(z)<=2forall
  z),

NONDEP:=some3x3minorofC(z)isnotidenticallyzero(rank_BC(z)=3
  generically).

  Lemma 1 (when cвҲүB, the branch is always NONDEP). The z-leading symbols of
  columns1,2areГў_1=-q1^1=-c_bcandГў_2=-q1^2=-c_b.AuniversalB-dependence
  ОІ_1v_1+ОІ_2v_2+ОІ_3v_3вүЎ0 forces, on the s-coordinate z-leading part, c_b(ОІ_1
c+ОІ_2)=0; with c_bвү 0 and cвҲүB this gives ОІ_1=ОІ_2=0, thenthet-coordinae

z-leadingpartgivesОІ_3=0.Sonouniversaldependenceвҹ№NONDEP.(When

cвҲҲB,dвҲүB,separatednessstillholdsbut1,careB-dependent,soDEPbecomes

possibleвҖ”thatistheoneresidualsub-casebelow.)

  Lemma 2 (NONDEP collapses the wall to a single Q-decision; rank-drop is
  negligible).OnNONDEPtherank-droplocus{rank_BC(z)вүӨ2}isthecommonzero
  set of finitely many nonzero bounded-degree polynomials in (z_0,z_1), hence
O(p) point.For every z off that locus, rank_B C(z)=3,soQ(z)=0 is necesary

andsufficient.Therefore

NONDEP,Qвүў0вҹ№C2вҠҶ{Q=0}вҲӘ{rank-drop}=O(p)+O(p)=O(p)[Cycle16],

NONDEP,QвүЎ0вҹ№everyzofftheO(p)rank-droplocusisrealizableвҹ№C2=
  p^2 - O(p) = Оҳ(p^2).

  This is the precise correction to the Cycle 25 audit. The audit worried that
  rank-dropstratamightmakeQвүЎ0insufficientandsecretlyrescueO(p).On
  NONDEP that worry is void: rank-drop is only O(p) values of z, so the
augmeted-minrcondiionshere cannot change th asymptotic count. OnNONDEP

thewallisexactly"QвүЎ0?"вҖ”noranksubtletysurvives.(Idonotassert

QвүЎ0happens;andtheОҳ(p^2)conclusionisstillgatedbythe

distinct-split-cubicrequirement,seebelow.)

  Lemma 3 (DEP restricts, it does not expand). If DEP holds (rank_B C(z)вүӨ2 for
  allz),thenQвүЎ0automaticallyandcarriesnoinformation.Realizabilityis
  v_0(z)вҲҲU(z) with U(z)=span_B C(z) of B-dimension вүӨ2, i.e. two independent
B-linearconditions в„“_1(z)В·v_0(z)=в„“_2(z)В·v_0(z)=0, eachabounded-degree

polynomialin(z_0,z_1).TheircommonzerosetisO(p)(apropersubvariety)

unlessbothvanishidentically.Soarankdropmakestherealizableset

smaller,neverОҳ(p^2),exceptinthesingledegenerateeventwherethe

augmented4Г—4matrix[c_1|c_2|c_3|c_0]hasrank_BвүӨ2identically.

  Net structural statement (rank-correct, replaces the false "QвүЎ0 вҹ№ every slope
  realized"):

C2=Оҳ(p^2)вҹәtherealizablelocus{z:c_0(z)вҲҲspan_BC(z)}is2-dimensional

вҹә(NONDEPandQвүЎ0)or(DEPandthetwoaugmentedconditions
  вүЎ 0).
  OtherwiseC2=O(p).

The explicitfirst obstructin (degree-4 oeffcint ofQ)

  Using s_i=a_i+m_z(Гў_i), t_i=c_i+m_z(tМӮ_i) and вҹЁm_z x,m_z yвҹ©=N(z)вҹЁx,yвҹ©, the
  degree-4partofQfactorsasN(z)^2В·Q_4withN(z)=zВ·zМ„the(nonzero,
  anisotropic) norm form. Since Гў_3=0 (column 3 is z-constant in s), three of
the six PlГјckerterms dropand

Q_4=N(c_b)В·[Im_Оұ(c)В·Im_Оұ(q2^0)+Im_Оұ(cМ„В·w)В·Im_Оұ(q2^2)вҲ’Im_Оұ(w)В·Im_Оұ(q2^1)
  ],

w=c^2вҲ’d,q2^2=P,q2^1=d+Pc,q2^0=cd+PВ·w,P=P_E(u,b)/Оә.

  Because N(z)^2 вүў 0:

Q_4вү 0вҹ№Qвүў0вҹ№C2=O(p)(onNONDEP,henceontheentirecвҲүBbranch).

  The factor N(c_b)вү 0 (source-valid c_bвү 0) and the appearance of Im_Оұ(c)вү 0 (cвҲүB)
  makeQ_4genericallynonzero.SoaОҳ(p^2)seedonthecвҲүBbranchrequiresthe
  explicit scalar equation Q_4=0 plus all lower-order coefficients of Q to
vanish, plusthe pli-cuic gate. This isstrcly sharperthan "is QвүЎ0": it

isrank-stratified,anditpinsthefirstvanishingcoefficientinclosed

form.(IpresentQ_4ascomputedfromthebankedclosedforms;the

deterministiccheckerbelowshouldconfirmitbeforeitistreatedasmore

thanaguide.)

  Where det M sits (kept separate, per Cycle 25)

  det M=(c_b/Оә^2)D, with D=N(в„“)Оә=ОәвҲҸ_{aвҲҲF_p}E(a)вү 0 (Cycle 24), is the z-free
  coefficient-framedeterminantofП„вҶҰ[q1:p1вҲ’q2:p2]вҲҲP^2(F).Itgovernswhether
  the witnessing co-support П„(z) exists and is non-degenerate (relevant to the
distic-D-split-cubic gte X^3вҲ’П„_1X^2+П„_2XвҲ’П„_3 splittingwith distincroots

inF_p),butitislogicallyindependentofthez-fiberobjectQ.Itneither

forcesNONDEPnordecidesQвүЎ0.Sothisbranchisgenuinelyliveandisnota

disguisedre-runoftheCycle24D=0cut.

  Answers to the three questions

  1. Not fully proved. But the rank stratification is resolved: rank-drop can
  onlyreduceC2(Lemma2onNONDEP,Lemma3onDEP).SoO(p)holdsonNONDEP
  whenever Qвүў0, in particular whenever Q_4вү 0; and cвҲүB source-valid data are
always NONDEP.

2.Notproduced,andnotcitingscans.AОҳ(p^2)seedisnowpinnedtoa
  measure-zero event: (NONDEP & QвүЎ0) forcing Q_4=0 and all lower coefficients,
  orthesingleDEP-degeneratelocuswithcвҲҲB,dвҲүB.
  3. Smallest exact decider isolated below.

  Smallest exact decider (checker / elimination ideal)

I_Q=idealofthe<=15coefficientsQ_{kl}ofQ(z_0,z_1)(topcoeff=
  N-form * Q_4 above),

I_aug=idealoftheaugmented-rankconditionsfortheDEPlocus(3x3minors
  of [C|c_0]),

I_valid=(вҲҸ_{aвҲҲF_p}E(a))В·ОәВ·c_bВ·detMinverted(Rabinowitsch),+gcd(E,E^П„)=1
  (separated).

  Decide:  is V(I_Q) вҲ© {NONDEP} вҲ© {source-valid}  empty,  AND

isV(I_aug)вҲ©{DEP,cвҲҲB,dвҲүB}вҲ©{source-valid}empty?

Ifbothemptyвҹ№PROOF:C2=O(p)onthewholebranch.

  checker(p):

input:c,dвҲҲF;W_{n-1},W_{n-2},W_{n-3};u,bвҲҲF(residue-linedata)
    filter: вҲҸ_{aвҲҲF_p}E(a)вү 0 ; gcd(E,E^П„)=1 ; Оәвү 0 ; c_bвү 0 ; detMвү 0

build:О·,P,q_i,p_i,c_b;columnsv_0..v_3;4x4B-detQ;3x3minorsofC
  and of [C|c_0]

emit:stratumвҲҲ{NONDEP,DEP},degQ,Q_4,[Q_{kl}],Q_identically_zero,

rankdrop_count,augmented_ideal_dim,C2=#{z:c_0(z)вҲҲspan_BC(z)},

split_distinct_countamongwitnessingП„(z),status

flag:(NONDEP&QвүЎ0)OR(DEP&augmentedвүЎ0),source-valid,splitcubics
  retained

вҶ’candidateОҳ(q_line)seed(NOTproof)

  BANKABLE_LEMMA

  Banked (restricted D=F_p, t=Пғ=2, j=3, off R0, source-valid):

  1. DEP/NONDEP dichotomy via C(z)-minors, with cвҲүB вҹ№ NONDEP (leading symbols
  c_bc,c_bareB-independent).

2.NONDEPreduction:rank-dropisO(p)points,soQвүў0вҹ№C2=O(p)and
  QвүЎ0вҹ№C2=Оҳ(p^2); the rank-stratification adds nothing on NONDEP. This corrects
  theCycle25audit'sopenworry.

3.DEPrestriction:auniversalrankdropturnsrealizabilityintotwo
  augmented B-conditions, giving O(p) unless they vanish identically; rank drop
  nevermanufacturesОҳ(p^2)exceptinthatexplicitdegeneratelocus.

4.Explicitdegree-4obstruction:deg-4partofQisN(z)^2В·Q_4withthe
  closed Q_4 above; Q_4вү 0 вҹ№ Qвүў0 вҹ№ C2=O(p), and Q_4 is generically nonzero
  (N(c_b)Im_Оұ(c)factor).

  Residual EXACT_NEW_WALL: W-F1-AA-RES-T2J3-QZERO-RANK-IDEAL вҖ” decide emptiness
  ofV(I_Q)вҲ©{NONDEP,source-valid}andofthe
  DEP/cвҲҲB,dвҲүB/augmented-identically-zero locus, both saturated at
ОәВ·c_bВ·detMВ·вҲҸ_aE(a).

  Not banked: any O(p) proof on the full live branch, any counterpacket, any
  corrected-reserve/q_gen/protocol/list/CA/MCA/line-decoding/SNARKconsequence,
  any finite-scan-as-proof. I did not repeat QвүЎ0 вҹ№ every slope realized: the
Оҳ(p^2) conclusion is conditinal on NONDEP, carris an O(p)rank-drop

correction,andremainsgatedbythedistinct-split-cubicrequirement.

Routetoafullsolve?

  Yes, and it is now a single bounded inequation plus one narrow locus, not the
  open-ended"isQвүЎ0."

Concretely,showtheвүӨ9-parametersystem

Im_Оұ(c)В·Im_Оұ(cd+Pw)+Im_Оұ(cМ„w)В·Im_Оұ(P)вҲ’Im_Оұ(w)В·Im_Оұ(d+Pc)=0,

cвҲүB,Оәвү 0,c_bвү 0,вҲҸ_{aвҲҲF_p}E(a)вү 0,P=P_E(u,b)/Оә

where Cycle 22/24's Im_Оұ decupling identities (Im_Оұ(J_A)=2Im_Оұ(d)+Im_Оұ(c)f_2)

arethenaturalnexttool.TheN(c_b)Im_Оұ(c)structureofQ_4makesemptiness

(PROOF,C2=O(p))themorelikelyoutcome,butitisnotyetdecided.

# Cycle 26 attack: `W-F1-AA-RES-T2J3-QZERO-RANK-CONSISTENCY`

Ledger respected: `B=F_p` (`q_gen=p`), `F=F_{p^2}` (`q_line=p^2`), `q_chal` unused, `D=F_p` (`n=p`), `t=sigma=2`, `j=3`, `eta_reserve=2/n` sub-reserve, off `R0` (`kappa=uвҲ§bвү 0`). Restricted line-incidence/residue calculation only; no `q_gen`/protocol/list/CA/MCA/line-decoding/curve-MCA/SNARK claim.

I worked the realized-slope condition `c_0(z) вҲҲ span_B(c_1(z),c_2(z),c_3(z))` directly, in the `F`-plane model. The result corrects a gap in how Cycle 25's audit framed the rank-drop strata, and isolates a single explicit scalar obstruction.

## Setup I use

Off `R0`, `{u,b}` (`u=[W]_E`, `b=[Bnum]_E`) is an `F`-basis of `A=F[X]/E`, so the `F`-linear iso `Aвү…F^2`, `c=su+tb вҶҰ (s,t)`, carries each column to a vector `v_i(z)=(s_i(z),t_i(z))вҲҲF^2`, and `F^2вү…B^4` via `{1,Оұ}`. From Cycle 25/20:

```text
v_1=(p1^1 - z q1^1,  p2^1 - z q2^1),   v_2=(p1^2 - z q1^2,  p2^2 - z q2^2),
v_3=(-1, z),                           v_0=(p1^0 - z q1^0,  p2^0 - z q2^0),
q1 = c_bВ·О·,  О·=(c^2-d)+cП„_1+П„_2  вҹ№  q1^1=c_b c, q1^2=c_b, q1^0=c_b(c^2-d).
```

Realizable slope `z` вҹә `v_0(z) вҲҲ span_B(v_1(z),v_2(z),v_3(z)) вҠҶ F^2вү…B^4`. Write `вҹЁx,yвҹ©:=Im_Оұ(xМ„y)` for the alternating `B`-area form (so `вҹЁx,yвҹ©=0 вҹә x,y` are `B`-proportional). Let `C(z)=[v_1|v_2|v_3]вҲҲMat_{4Г—3}(B)`.

## The rank stratification, done correctly

Define the two strata by the `3Г—3` minors of `C(z)` as polynomials in `(z_0,z_1)`:

```text
DEP    := all 3x3 minors of C(z) vanish identically  (rank_B C(z) <= 2 for all z),
NONDEP := some 3x3 minor of C(z) is not identically zero (rank_B C(z)=3 generically).
```

**Lemma 1 (when `cвҲүB`, the branch is always NONDEP).** The `z`-leading symbols of columns `1,2` are `Гў_1=-q1^1=-c_b c` and `Гў_2=-q1^2=-c_b`. A universal `B`-dependence `ОІ_1v_1+ОІ_2v_2+ОІ_3v_3вүЎ0` forces, on the `s`-coordinate `z`-leading part, `c_b(ОІ_1 c+ОІ_2)=0`; with `c_bвү 0` and `cвҲүB` this gives `ОІ_1=ОІ_2=0`, then the `t`-coordinate `z`-leading part gives `ОІ_3=0`. So no universal dependence вҹ№ NONDEP. (When `cвҲҲB,dвҲүB`, separatedness still holds but `1,c` are `B`-dependent, so DEP becomes possible вҖ” that is the one residual sub-case below.)

**Lemma 2 (NONDEP collapses the wall to a single Q-decision; rank-drop is negligible).** On NONDEP the rank-drop locus `{rank_B C(z)вүӨ2}` is the common zero set of finitely many nonzero bounded-degree polynomials in `(z_0,z_1)`, hence `O(p)` points. For every `z` off that locus, `rank_B C(z)=3`, so `Q(z)=0` is necessary **and sufficient**. Therefore

```text
NONDEP, Q вүў 0  вҹ№  C2 вҠҶ {Q=0} вҲӘ {rank-drop} = O(p) + O(p) = O(p)   [Cycle 16],
NONDEP, Q вүЎ 0  вҹ№  every z off the O(p) rank-drop locus is realizable вҹ№ C2 = p^2 - O(p) = Оҳ(p^2).
```

This is the precise correction to the Cycle 25 audit. The audit worried that rank-drop strata might make `QвүЎ0` insufficient and secretly rescue `O(p)`. On NONDEP that worry is void: rank-drop is only `O(p)` values of `z`, so the augmented-minor conditions there cannot change the asymptotic count. On NONDEP the wall is exactly "`Q вүЎ 0`?" вҖ” no rank subtlety survives. (I do **not** assert `QвүЎ0` happens; and the `Оҳ(p^2)` conclusion is still gated by the distinct-split-cubic requirement, see below.)

**Lemma 3 (DEP *restricts*, it does not expand).** If DEP holds (`rank_B C(z)вүӨ2` for all `z`), then `QвүЎ0` automatically and carries no information. Realizability is `v_0(z)вҲҲU(z)` with `U(z)=span_B C(z)` of `B`-dimension `вүӨ2`, i.e. **two** independent `B`-linear conditions `в„“_1(z)В·v_0(z)=в„“_2(z)В·v_0(z)=0`, each a bounded-degree polynomial in `(z_0,z_1)`. Their common zero set is `O(p)` (a proper subvariety) **unless both vanish identically**. So a rank drop makes the realizable set *smaller*, never `Оҳ(p^2)`, except in the single degenerate event where the augmented `4Г—4` matrix `[c_1|c_2|c_3|c_0]` has `rank_BвүӨ2` identically.

Net structural statement (rank-correct, replaces the false "`QвүЎ0 вҹ№ every slope realized`"):

```text
C2 = Оҳ(p^2)  вҹә  the realizable locus {z: c_0(z)вҲҲspan_B C(z)} is 2-dimensional
             вҹә  (NONDEP and Q вүЎ 0)  or  (DEP and the two augmented conditions вүЎ 0).
Otherwise C2 = O(p).
```

## The explicit first obstruction (degree-4 coefficient of `Q`)

Using `s_i=a_i+m_z(Гў_i)`, `t_i=c_i+m_z(tМӮ_i)` and `вҹЁm_z x,m_z yвҹ©=N(z)вҹЁx,yвҹ©`, the degree-4 part of `Q` factors as `N(z)^2В·Q_4` with `N(z)=zВ·zМ„` the (nonzero, anisotropic) norm form. Since `Гў_3=0` (column 3 is `z`-constant in `s`), three of the six PlГјcker terms drop and

```text
Q_4 = N(c_b)В·[ Im_Оұ(c)В·Im_Оұ(q2^0) + Im_Оұ(cМ„В·w)В·Im_Оұ(q2^2) вҲ’ Im_Оұ(w)В·Im_Оұ(q2^1) ],
w = c^2 вҲ’ d,   q2^2 = P,  q2^1 = d + Pc,  q2^0 = cd + PВ·w,   P = P_E(u,b)/Оә.
```

Because `N(z)^2 вүў 0`:

```text
Q_4 вү  0  вҹ№  Q вүў 0  вҹ№  C2 = O(p)   (on NONDEP, hence on the entire cвҲүB branch).
```

The factor `N(c_b)вү 0` (source-valid `c_bвү 0`) and the appearance of `Im_Оұ(c)вү 0` (`cвҲүB`) make `Q_4` generically nonzero. So a `Оҳ(p^2)` seed on the `cвҲүB` branch **requires** the explicit scalar equation `Q_4=0` *plus* all lower-order coefficients of `Q` to vanish, *plus* the split-cubic gate. This is strictly sharper than "is `QвүЎ0`": it is rank-stratified, and it pins the first vanishing coefficient in closed form. (I present `Q_4` as computed from the banked closed forms; the deterministic checker below should confirm it before it is treated as more than a guide.)

## Where `det M` sits (kept separate, per Cycle 25)

`det M=(c_b/Оә^2)D`, with `D=N(в„“)Оә=ОәвҲҸ_{aвҲҲF_p}E(a)вү 0` (Cycle 24), is the **`z`-free coefficient-frame** determinant of `П„вҶҰ[q1:p1вҲ’q2:p2]вҲҲP^2(F)`. It governs whether the witnessing co-support `П„(z)` exists and is non-degenerate (relevant to the distinct-`D`-split-cubic gate `X^3вҲ’П„_1X^2+П„_2XвҲ’П„_3` splitting with distinct roots in `F_p`), but it is logically independent of the `z`-fiber object `Q`. It neither forces NONDEP nor decides `QвүЎ0`. So this branch is genuinely live and is not a disguised re-run of the Cycle 24 `D=0` cut.

## Answers to the three questions

1. Not fully proved. But the rank stratification is resolved: rank-drop can only *reduce* `C2` (Lemma 2 on NONDEP, Lemma 3 on DEP). So `O(p)` holds on NONDEP whenever `Qвүў0`, in particular whenever `Q_4вү 0`; and `cвҲүB` source-valid data are always NONDEP.
2. Not produced, and not citing scans. A `Оҳ(p^2)` seed is now pinned to a measure-zero event: `(NONDEP & QвүЎ0)` forcing `Q_4=0` and all lower coefficients, **or** the single DEP-degenerate locus with `cвҲҲB,dвҲүB`.
3. Smallest exact decider isolated below.

## Smallest exact decider (checker / elimination ideal)

```text
I_Q     = ideal of the <=15 coefficients Q_{kl} of Q(z_0,z_1) (top coeff = N-form * Q_4 above),
I_aug   = ideal of the augmented-rank conditions for the DEP locus (3x3 minors of [C|c_0]),
I_valid = (вҲҸ_{aвҲҲF_p}E(a))В·ОәВ·c_bВ·detM inverted (Rabinowitsch), + gcd(E,E^П„)=1 (separated).

Decide:  is V(I_Q) вҲ© {NONDEP} вҲ© {source-valid}  empty,  AND
         is V(I_aug) вҲ© {DEP, cвҲҲB,dвҲүB} вҲ© {source-valid} empty?
If both empty  вҹ№ PROOF: C2 = O(p) on the whole branch.
```

```text
checker(p):
  input : c,dвҲҲF ; W_{n-1},W_{n-2},W_{n-3} ; u,bвҲҲF (residue-line data)
  filter: вҲҸ_{aвҲҲF_p}E(a)вү 0 ; gcd(E,E^П„)=1 ; Оәвү 0 ; c_bвү 0 ; detMвү 0
  build : О·,P,q_i,p_i,c_b ; columns v_0..v_3 ; 4x4 B-det Q ; 3x3 minors of C and of [C|c_0]
  emit  : stratumвҲҲ{NONDEP,DEP}, degQ, Q_4, [Q_{kl}], Q_identically_zero,
          rankdrop_count, augmented_ideal_dim, C2=#{z: c_0(z)вҲҲspan_B C(z)},
          split_distinct_count among witnessing П„(z), status
  flag  : (NONDEP & QвүЎ0) OR (DEP & augmentedвүЎ0), source-valid, split cubics retained
          вҶ’ candidate Оҳ(q_line) seed (NOT proof)
```

## Primary label

```text
BANKABLE_LEMMA
```

Banked (restricted `D=F_p`, `t=Пғ=2`, `j=3`, off `R0`, source-valid):

1. **DEP/NONDEP dichotomy via `C(z)`-minors**, with `cвҲүB вҹ№ NONDEP` (leading symbols `c_b c, c_b` are `B`-independent).
2. **NONDEP reduction**: rank-drop is `O(p)` points, so `Qвүў0вҹ№C2=O(p)` and `QвүЎ0вҹ№C2=Оҳ(p^2)`; the rank-stratification adds nothing on NONDEP. This corrects the Cycle 25 audit's open worry.
3. **DEP restriction**: a universal rank drop turns realizability into two augmented `B`-conditions, giving `O(p)` unless they vanish identically; rank drop never manufactures `Оҳ(p^2)` except in that explicit degenerate locus.
4. **Explicit degree-4 obstruction**: `deg-4` part of `Q` is `N(z)^2В·Q_4` with the closed `Q_4` above; `Q_4вү 0 вҹ№ Qвүў0 вҹ№ C2=O(p)`, and `Q_4` is generically nonzero (`N(c_b)Im_Оұ(c)` factor).

Residual `EXACT_NEW_WALL`: `W-F1-AA-RES-T2J3-QZERO-RANK-IDEAL` вҖ” decide emptiness of `V(I_Q)вҲ©{NONDEP,source-valid}` and of the DEP/`cвҲҲB,dвҲүB`/augmented-identically-zero locus, both saturated at `ОәВ·c_bВ·detMВ·вҲҸ_aE(a)`.

Not banked: any `O(p)` proof on the full live branch, any counterpacket, any corrected-reserve/`q_gen`/protocol/list/CA/MCA/line-decoding/SNARK consequence, any finite-scan-as-proof. I did **not** repeat `QвүЎ0 вҹ№ every slope realized`: the `Оҳ(p^2)` conclusion is conditional on NONDEP, carries an `O(p)` rank-drop correction, and remains gated by the distinct-split-cubic requirement.

## Route to a full solve?

Yes, and it is now a single bounded inequation plus one narrow locus, not the open-ended "is `QвүЎ0`."

Next exact lemma to prove (or refute): **on NONDEP source-valid data, `Q_4 вү  0`.** Concretely, show the `вүӨ9`-parameter system

```text
Im_Оұ(c)В·Im_Оұ(cd+Pw) + Im_Оұ(cМ„ w)В·Im_Оұ(P) вҲ’ Im_Оұ(w)В·Im_Оұ(d+Pc) = 0,
cвҲүB,  Оәвү 0,  c_bвү 0,  вҲҸ_{aвҲҲF_p}E(a)вү 0,  P=P_E(u,b)/Оә
```

has no source-valid solutions (GrГ¶bner saturation over `Q`, `p` carried symbolically via `N(в„“)=вҲҸE(a)`). If so, `Qвүў0` on the entire `cвҲүB` branch вҹ№ `C2=O(p)` there, and the whole wall reduces to the lone `cвҲҲB, dвҲүB` DEP-degenerate locus, where Cycle 22/24's `Im_Оұ` decoupling identities (`Im_Оұ(J_A)=2Im_Оұ(d)+Im_Оұ(c)f_2`) are the natural next tool. The `N(c_b)Im_Оұ(c)` structure of `Q_4` makes emptiness (PROOF, `C2=O(p)`) the more likely outcome, but it is not yet decided.
